description_long: This apartment building features a striking modern design with multiple staggered levels and interconnected terraces. The structure is primarily composed of geometric volumes in a muted pink hue, complemented by white railings and green rooftop gardens. Several outdoor staircases and walkways connect the different levels, creating a dynamic, multi-tiered appearance. The building includes open terraces and balconies, providing ample outdoor space for residents. Large, flat surfaces and minimal ornamentation emphasize its contemporary architectural style. The presence of human figures suggests a spacious scale and highlights the walkable and enterable nature of the building.
description: A modern, multi-level apartment building with pink geometric forms, white railings, and green rooftop terraces, featuring interconnected outdoor walkways and balconies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, multiple terraces, and a prominent staircase leading to upper levels, with visible human figures for scale.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staggered levels, extensive green rooftop areas, and the angular arrangement of balconies and terraces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the interconnected staircases, large open terrace spaces, and the layered structure of the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the vertical stacking of floors, multiple balconies, and the integration of green spaces throughout the design.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are sparsely distributed and asymmetrically placed, with some grouped near terraces and others isolated, contributing to the modern, irregular facade.
